w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du wp14

w:r.w:t: Installation & Commissioning of IP CCTV Surveillance System
We are pleased to submit our quotation for the Supply, Installation, Configuration, and Commissioning of a complete IP-based CCTV Surveillance System for Cordial

Our proposed solution is designed to ensure reliable performance, enhanced security, and high-quality video monitoring. We specialize in providing end-to-end surveillance solutions tailored to meet modern security requirements.
• Supply of high-quality IP CCTV Cameras
• Provision of Network Video Recorder (NVR) with required storage capacity
• Supply and installation of all necessary networking and power cables
• Structured cabling and proper routing for optimal performance
We are committed to delivering a dependable and cost-effective security solution with proper after-sales support.

w:r.w:t: Lens: 2.8 and 4 mm, Aperture: F1.6, IR Distance: 50 meters
Features: PoE, DWDR, 3D DNR, Smart Detection, IP67, Built-in
), Cable clip, Cable tie, Shettel, Royal plug, Screw, Electric tape
anagement software training, system testing, and 1 year of post-installation support.
This quotation is valid for 10 days from the date of submission.
The project timeline will be 10 days from the date of receipt of the Work
50% Advance: Payable upon confirmation of work order.
40% Progress Payment: Payable midway through the project execution.
10% Final Payment: Payable upon successful completion and handover/delivery.
Standard 12 months against any manufacturing defects from the date of delivery of site.
